creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
I use it every day many times.
Icons lost after migration to gtk3, it was dissapointing to me and I was thinking that it is gtk3 issue.

Tonight I build taskmanager in CodeLite to debug and fix icon missing and it does not start until I change wnck-1.0 to wnck-3.0, after start I see icons :)
Now I am looking for how to save setting in quit via tray menu.
